publishedAbstract: - The `db-noobaa-db-pg-0` PVC has become full, preventing Postgres (OCS/ODF 4.7+) or Mongo (OCS 4.6 and below) server from starting.- There are some related articles that report a similar issue: [Expanding the db-noobaa-db-pg PVC- OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) v4.19+](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/7132127) [Change the Multi-Cloud Object Gateway Database's Collation Locale to C](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/7031666) [How to Check the Size/Consumption of the PostgreSQL Database in the db-noobaa-db-pg-0 PVC](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/7116750)
publishedTitle: How to expand the "db-noobaa-db-pg-0" PVC on OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) 4.18 and below
